hero.title: Care, tailored to you
hero.intro: Everything you need — arranged quietly and entirely around you. From a private chef to transfers and spa, let us make your stay effortless.

chef.title: Private chef
chef.description: A signature menu born from the season and local produce — cooked before you and served to the rhythm of your evening.
features: A personal menu to your taste

transfer.title: Transfer & transport
transfer.description: From the airport to Mandara's doorstep — a calm journey with a private driver, arranged down to the last detail.

spa.title: Spa & wellness
spa.description: Massages and rituals with local herbs, in the quiet of the villa — care for body and mind, in private.

tasting.title: Tastings
tasting.description: Evenings of local wines and produce, led by a connoisseur — the taste of the region, served slowly.

concierge.title: Concierge
concierge.description: One person who arranges everything — reservations, surprises and wishes, fulfilled quietly and on time.

butler.title: Butler & housekeeping
butler.description: A discreet presence that keeps your home impeccable — so only the calm remains.
